economic_ownership_map.label: Existing produced-water network enterprise value

source.locator: Q1 2026 adjusted EBITDA $102.9M on 2.5M bbl/d (Exhibit 99.1 / MD&A)
Long-term fixed-fee contracts ~10.4-year weighted average remaining life; ~2.4M dedicated acres
47.016M Class A plus 76.440M Class B/OpCo units (valuation.json anchor)

low.label: 2026 normalized adjusted EBITDA for existing network
low.rationale: 2026 company guidance $425M-$465M; low/base/high use $380M/$445M/$500M before growth-option overlap.

low.label: Share of normalized EBITDA from dedicated long-term contracts
low.rationale: Filings disclose dedications and MVCs but not cash split; low/base/high use 75%/85%/90% contracted share.

low.label: Share of normalized EBITDA from merchant or short-cycle volume
low.rationale: Merchant share is the residual after contracted share; valued at lower multiple.

low.label: EV/EBITDA on contracted cash flow
low.rationale: Premium to Gravity Water ~5.5x for scale, 10.4-year WARM, and 71% of contracts with initial term >=15 years.

low.label: EV/EBITDA on merchant cash flow
low.rationale: Lower multiple on non-dedicated volume; renewal and utilization risk explicit in low case.

low.label: Q1 2026 net cash from operating activities

source.locator: Net cash provided by operating activities $95.1M for quarter ended March 31, 2026
47.016M Class A plus 76.440M Class B/OpCo units

low.label: Debt principal under refinancing stress
low.rationale: Low case adds revolver draw and fees; high case assumes modest paydown before valuation date.

low.label: Cash available to net against debt
low.rationale: Stress liquidity haircut in low case; high case assumes modest build.

low.label: 2026 adjusted EBITDA in funding stress case
low.rationale: Low uses bottom of 2026 guidance; base/high use midpoint and top of guide.

low.label: 2026 growth capital program in stress case
low.rationale: Low uses top of $430M-$490M guidance; high assumes on-budget spend.

low.label: Maintenance and other investing cash not in growth guide
low.rationale: Not separately disclosed; bounded assumption for sources-and-uses bridge.

low.label: Annual cash interest under stress rates
low.rationale: Fixed notes plus revolver spread; low case assumes higher all-in coupon.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Discounting, realization friction, and the component assumptions reflect the time required to contract, develop, or monetize the claim.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: The component low/base/high range or milestone driver explicitly risks realization; uncertainty widens the range rather than creating a zero.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital is deducted in the driver where disclosed; otherwise the range and realization reserve reflect the unresolved capital burden.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: The next decision milestone fails, remaining capital rises materially, or the stated success probability no longer fits observable progress.

method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

falsifiers: Utilization, incremental after-tax return on capital, or contract economics fall below the low-case assumptions.
The obligation, financing claim, tax, or realization friction is materially larger than the low-case reserve.
The next decision milestone fails, remaining capital rises materially, or the stated success probability no longer fits observable progress.
The obligation, financing claim, tax, or realization friction is materially larger than the low-case reserve.
Utilization, incremental after-tax return on capital, or contract economics fall below the low-case assumptions.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
cohort_purpose: Contracted infrastructure, project-cohort returns, leverage, and funding.
